assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions testing on Rapid channel dev clusters first and provides a staging approach that differentiates between dev and prod cluster upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Includes an 'Autopilot-Specific Checks' section that mentions resource requests within Autopilot limits and restrictions on hostNetwork/privileged containers

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes checking for deprecated API versions in manifests and provides kubectl export commands for backing up configurations

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Verify resource requests are within Autopilot limits' in the Autopilot-specific checks section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Application Readiness section includes PodDisruptionBudgets configuration, handling pod disruptions gracefully, and multiple replicas for critical services

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Immediate Verification section includes specific kubectl commands to check cluster version: 'kubectl version --short'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Application Health Check section includes comprehensive workload validation including pod health, endpoints, service discovery, and database connections

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist explicitly states to verify Rapid channel dev clusters are on 1.30+ and run full test suite before prod upgrade
Multiple sections address monitoring including setting up enhanced monitoring, configuring alerts, and validating monitoring systems post-upgrade
